prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.8 kg; Height 155.6 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.5%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 284mg/dL; 9 months ago 229mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 260mg/dL; current 211mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.1kg; 9 months ago 49.9kg; 6 months ago 51.3kg; 3 months ago 51.8kg; current 50.8kg), Height (12 months ago 155.6cm; 9 months ago 155.6cm; 6 months ago 155.6cm; 3 months ago 155.6cm; current 155.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 6.1mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.2mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 106mg/g; 9 months ago 114mg/g; 6 months ago 89mg/g; 3 months ago 87mg/g; current 134mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.2g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.89 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
